DEADCELLS-ALIVE.title: Survival Scroll
DEADCELLS-ALIVE.description:
Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
At the start of each combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
DEADCELLS-ALIVE.flavor: [red]As long as I can reach that place...[/red]
DEADCELLS-BACKPACK_AT.title: Porcupack
DEADCELLS-BACKPACK_AT.description:
Upon pickup, choose a [gold]Skill[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to replace with [gold]Roll[/gold].
Whenever you play [gold]Roll[/gold], automatically play an [gold]Attack[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
[red]Roll, roll, roll!!![/red]
DEADCELLS-BACKPACK_AT.flavor: [red]An old backpack. You can stash more weapons in it.[/red]
DEADCELLS-BACKPACK_SK.title: Acrobatipack
DEADCELLS-BACKPACK_SK.description:
Upon pickup, choose an [gold]Attack[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to replace with [gold]Roll[/gold].
Whenever you play [gold]Roll[/gold], automatically play a [gold]Skill[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
[red]The urge to roll has grown even stronger!?[/red]
DEADCELLS-BACKPACK_SK.flavor: [red]A backpack full of gadgets. It looks like it could help you pull off even trickier moves.[/red]
DEADCELLS-CHOPPER.title: Chopper
DEADCELLS-CHOPPER.description: At the end of your turn, kill all enemies at or below [blue]{DeadLine}%[/blue] of their Max HP.
DEADCELLS-CHOPPER.flavor: [red]As they say: if it doesn't kill you, finish it off.[/red]
DEADCELLS-CORRUPTED_ARTIFACT.title: Corrupted Artifact
DEADCELLS-COUNTERATTACK.title: Counterattack
DEADCELLS-COUNTERATTACK.description: Whenever you fully [gold]Block[/gold] an attack, your next [gold]Attack[/gold] deals [blue]4[/blue] additional damage.
DEADCELLS-DEFENDER.title: Defender
DEADCELLS-DEFENDER.description:
During the first turn of each combat, take [blue]20%[/blue] less damage.
During the second turn, reduce damage taken by [blue]1[/blue].
DEADCELLS-DEFENDER.flavor: [red]It may be called a Defender, but you've probably seen other monsters using it as a weapon.[/red]
DEADCELLS-EMERALD_AMULET.title: Emerald Amulet
DEADCELLS-EMERALD_AMULET.description: At the start of each combat, put [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Roll[/gold] with [gold]Retain[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-EMERALD_AMULET.flavor: [red]The King's amulet. It glows whenever danger is near.[/red]
DEADCELLS-EMERALD_AMULET_PLUS.title: Emerald Amulet+
DEADCELLS-EMERALD_AMULET_PLUS.descriptio: At the start of each combat, put [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Roll+[/gold] with [gold]Retain[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-EMERALD_AMULET_PLUS.flavor:
[red]See? An emerald really is better than an ordinary gem.
Now say thank you, Grandma (?)[/red]
DEADCELLS-NOCTURNE.title: Nocturne
DEADCELLS-NOCTURNE.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Skills[/gold] you play, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to a random enemy and apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Nocturne Mark[/gold] to it.
DEADCELLS-NOCTURNE.flavor: [red]A sealed demonic sword with a will of its own.[/red]
DEADCELLS-OPEN_WOUNDS.title: Open Wounds
DEADCELLS-OPEN_WOUNDS.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Bleeding[/gold].
DEADCELLS-OPPRESSIVE.title: Brutality Scroll
DEADCELLS-OPPRESSIVE.description:
Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Attack[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
DEADCELLS-PREDATOR.title: Predator
DEADCELLS-RAM_RUNE.title: Ram Rune
DEADCELLS-RAM_RUNE.description: Each turn, after you play at least [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Attacks[/gold], kill a [gold]Minion[/gold] if able. Otherwise, destroy all [gold]Block[/gold] on an enemy.
DEADCELLS-SEALS_RECIPE.title: Sealed Manual
DEADCELLS-SEALS_RECIPE.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
DEADCELLS-SEALS_RECIPE.flavor: [red]Once you pry it open, your movements become swifter and stronger.[/red]
DEADCELLS-SPIRE_PACE.title: Spire Pace
DEADCELLS-SPIRE_PACE.description: Whenever you play a card of a different type than the last card you played, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
DEADCELLS-SPIRE_PACE.flavor: [red]You barely have to think to know your next move.[/red]
DEADCELLS-TACTICAL.title: Tactics Scroll
DEADCELLS-TACTICAL.description: Upon pickup, remove a card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
